commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And before this, Eliashib the priest, having the oversight of the chamber of the house of our God, was allied unto Tobiah: Over this thing Or, he was faulty in this thing, or in this kind. (Challoner) He was the source of all this evil. Hebrew, "and before this Eliasib "It is probable that he was a different person from the high priest, (Usher) who had married his grandson to the daughter of Sanaballat, the intimate friend of Tobias. (Calmet) The latter was a persecutor, and prefigured heretics, as Nehemias did our Saviour, who drove traffickers out of the temple. Bede in Esdras, L. ) (Worthington).

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Over this thing: Or, he was faulty in this thing, or in this kind.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
